title: Issuance of bonds
doc_html:
§327.  Issuance of bonds

No bonds shall be issued by airport districts under this Part until they are approved by a vote of a majority in number of the qualified electors of the district, voting at an election held in the district for that purpose.

Amended by Acts 1975, No. 659, §1.
